items.summary: Aligned blocked-path semantics so self-check.json is required only when the run reached Step 3; precondition-failure blocked runs now end without that artifact.
Resolved the remaining self-check credibility gap by making the blocked terminal contract mechanically consistent with execution order and the Step 3 write point.
Applied the same Step-3-reached predicate in both the self-check lifecycle row and the blocked completion criteria to remove unconditional blocked-path self-check claims.
